name: Memory Layer 记忆分层
description: Enterprise-grade multi-channel layered memory plugin for multi-user OpenClaw agents

enabledAgents.label: Enabled Agents
enabledAgents.help: Leave empty to enable for all agents.

enabledChannels.label: Enabled Channels
enabledChannels.help: Leave empty to enable all supported channels.

includeGroups.label: Include Group Sessions
includeGroups.help: Disabled by default so personal memory stays tied to direct messages.

baseDir.label: Workspace Memory Folder
baseDir.help: Relative to each agent workspace unless sharedFilePath overrides the shared layer.

sharedFilePath.label: Shared Memory File
sharedFilePath.help: Optional absolute or workspace-relative path. Default shared memory lives at .memory-layer/shared/memory.md. Use the same absolute path across agents to share one team memory file.

autoCreateFiles.label: Pre-create Default Memory Files
autoCreateFiles.help: When enabled, the plugin creates default shared/personal memory templates up front. When disabled, it skips proactive template creation, but real writes may still create required parent directories or target files.

maxStoredSharedChars.label: Max Shared File Chars
maxStoredSharedChars.help: Soft cap for the stored shared memory file. Leave 0 to disable trimming.

maxStoredPersonalChars.label: Max Personal File Chars
maxStoredPersonalChars.help: Soft cap for each user's stored personal memory file. Leave 0 to disable trimming.

maxStoredHistoryChars.label: Max History File Chars
maxStoredHistoryChars.help: Soft cap for each user's daily history file. Leave 0 to disable trimming.

contextInjectionMode.label: Layered Context Injection Mode
contextInjectionMode.help: `always` injects shared, personal, notes, and history on every turn. `new-session` injects shared, personal, and notes on the first turn of a new session, but only injects history after automatic archival, not after user-triggered /new or /reset; newly saved shared/personal memory is reinjected once on the next turn. `off` disables layered memory injection.

historyInjectionMode.label: Deprecated: History Injection Mode
historyInjectionMode.help: Deprecated compatibility alias for `contextInjectionMode`. Existing configs may keep working, but new setups should use `contextInjectionMode`.
